case_title: ON24, INC. VS. TECHNOLOGY MARKETING CORPORATION
cause_of_action: PETITION RE: ARBITRATION (PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD)

docket_entries.description: MINI MINUTES FOR NOV-18-2020 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER ON24, INC. RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT TECHNOLOGY MARKETING CORPORATION $38,355.50 PRINCIPAL, $9,294.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $2,553.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $50,202.50, SEE SCANNED DOC

LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE NOV-18-2020 HEARING RE: PETITIONER ON24, INC.'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD AND ENTER JUDGMENT IN CONFORMANCE THEREWITH, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. calendar.matters:
Notice Of Petition And Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And Enter Judgment In Conformance Therewith
Off Calendar Nov-18-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PETITIONER ON24, INC.'s Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And Enter Judgment In Conformance Therewith.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Petition granted. No opposition filed.

Order signed. Judgment signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/EPS)
